author: Haroen Viaene
subject: chore(deps): deduplicate lockfile (#5171)
body:
This saves ~100MB of node_modules (950MB -> 850MB). There's probably even more simplifications possible, but these I saw easily possible (mainly using the https://github.com/scinos/yarn-deduplicate tool)

I couldn't find a tool that highlighted duplicates, but this is already an improvement, especially in preparation of more packages being added later.
